news.title: Spain, France, Argentina and England beware: Demons haunt the World Cup semi-finals
news.lede: The World Cup spotlight causes single games to live longer in the memory than any other. The remaining teams at this tournament face defining moments. World Cup games mean more. England have only ever played 80 games in the finals, which is to say, not much more than two Premier League seasons in the 76 years since they first entered.

news.title: 📸 France v Spain: line-ups from their last World Cup clash
news.lede: This Tuesday evening, July 14, the France team takes on Spain in the semi-finals of the 2026 World Cup. A clash with the feel of a final — and a chance for revenge for Les Bleus, two years after their defeat, again in the semi-finals, at Euro 2024 (2-1). But the last time Les Bleus and La Roja faced each other at the World Cup was... exactly 20 years ago! In 2006, in Germany, in the round of 16.

news.title: How to watch the 2026 World Cup with Sling TV: Channels, semifinals game schedule, and streaming deals
news.lede: If you buy something through a link in this article, we may earn commission. The 2026 FIFA World Cup runs through July 19, and in the U.S., every match of the tournament is being televised on either FOX or FS1. If you're looking for a low-cost cable alternative to tune in to every match without overpaying, Sling is one of our favorite streaming services. It lets you choose a plan with the channels you want most, so you don't pay for what you won't watch.

news.title: World Cup final prep! In Argentina, voodoo dolls with meal deals
news.lede: Argentina is a football-crazy nation. That is once again on full display at this World Cup. The fan support at the venues and in the stadium is gigantic. Sometimes, though, the love and passion for football goes beyond the boundaries of good taste.

news.title: France at the World Cup 2026: Squad, fixtures, group and history
news.lede: Everything you need to know about France at the 2026 World Cup: their fixtures, squad, qualifying record, key players, coach and tournament history. France were runners-up last time and will have an eye on the gold medals at FIFA World Cup 2026. Didier Deschamps' side, led by captain Kylian Mbappé, topped Group I ahead of Norway, Senegal and Iraq to reach the knockout phase. They then beat Sweden in the round of 32, Paraguay in the last 16 and Morocco in the quarter-finals.

news.title: Kerim Alajbegovic: Atalanta prepare offer for World Cup hero
news.lede: Kerim Alajbegovic made an impact for Bosnia at the FIFA World Cup and he is increasingly likely to end up in Serie A, with Atalanta keen. Alfredo Pedulla has reported updates about the teenager, who has rejoined Bayer Leverkusen. Atalanta have come out in the open to move for the attacker. Milan advisor Zlatan Ibrahimovic has been keen on him but the Rossoneri haven’t stepped forward on their own as a club.
